description: Development and maintenance of management software applications using technologies such as Visual Net, ASP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Java, and Workflows, on SQL Server databases. I work in a highly computerized and interconnected environment, providing support to internal and external clients. Participation in the management of application servers and databases on Windows and Linux platforms, using virtualization with VMWare. Supporting the improvement of process efficiency and automation to continuously improve the IT infrastructure.

Web development with Java EE, JSP, Servlets and application servers, as well as HTML, CSS, JavaScript and SQL, JUnit. Use of security standards with OWASP, CVSS, and manage Linux servers, GNU bash, tomcat servers.

Resolution of incidents coming from level 1 of support. Management and maintenance of applications and services with SQL Server databases, servers, Azure Devops, automated processes. Improvements in support processes and applications. Contact with external suppliers.

First line of contact with customers in English for IT support, resolution of problems and services. Efficient team work and interpersonal skills. Virtual Desktop Infraestructure handling. Compilation of requirements according to the user. Carrying out required reports to communicate between other teams. Efficient teamwork and support.
Virtual tutoring in the educational program of Plan Ceibal 'Youth to program' of Introduction to Programming and Computational Thinking with dynamic tools and languages such as JavaScript and Ruby.
